steps.title: Group the expression
steps.content:
Group the four terms in pairs:
$$
5x^2-8x+15x-24=(5x^2-8x)+(15x-24)
$$

steps.title: Factor each group
steps.content:
Each group has a common factor:
$$
x(5x-8)+3(5x-8)
$$
Now factor out the shared binomial:
$$
(x+3)(5x-8)
$$

steps.title: Identify the factor
steps.content: The expression $x+3$ is a factor. The answer is D.
